name: od-web-effect-extractor
title: Web effect extractor
description: Extract visual effects, Canvas/WebGL/Shader behavior, and interaction details from a reference website, then rebuild them as an editable Open Design artifact.

description_i18n.en: Extract visual effects, Canvas/WebGL/Shader behavior, and interaction details from a reference website, then rebuild them as an editable Open Design artifact.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 从参考网站提取视觉特效、Canvas/WebGL/Shader 行为与交互细节，并复刻为可编辑的 Open Design 产物。

query.en: Extract the visual effect from {{url}} and rebuild it as an editable Open Design web artifact. Focus on {{effectFocus}}.
query.zh-CN: 从 {{url}} 提取网页视觉特效，并复刻为可编辑的 Open Design 网页产物。重点关注 {{effectFocus}}。

inputs.name: effectFocus
inputs.label: Effect focus
inputs.placeholder: Hero WebGL background, scroll animation, cursor trail...
